_description: Arm-B no-load sample candidate v0. Hand-written poses transcribed from manual calibration notes. NOT validated against safety config. NOT executed on hardware.

steps.notes: Arm flat / level starting pose. ID2 high (770), ID3 mid (457).
Arm raised / bow pose. ID2 drops to 600, ID3 rises to 540.
Shoulder forward (400), elbow extends (590). Pre-grasp approach.
Full reach forward. ID2 at 250 (near limit?), ID3 at 646. WARNING: ID2=250 may be near lower limit.
Grasp pose. ID2 at 291, ID3 at 644. Gripper still at default (495).
Gripper opens to 220 (wider than home 497). WARNING: ID2=290 near lower limit.
Return to mid pose. ID2 back to 500, ID3 to 540, gripper partially closed (360).
Safe idle home pose. Same as config poses.safe_idle_home_like_6b. ID2 high (771), ID3 low (426). Arm stowed upright.

warnings: Step 3b: ID2=250 appears near lower mechanical limit. Verify safe range before execution.
Step 5: ID2=290 also near lower limit. Gripper at 220 (open) needs confirmation of open/close direction.
Step 6b: ID2=771 is well above default center 500. Verify this is a safe stowed position, not a mechanical limit.
All values are from manual notes. Pulse-to-angle mapping and direction NOT confirmed.
No current/temperature/stall monitoring data available for these poses.
pending_calibration: Confirm pulse increase direction for each joint
Record observed_lower_near_limit and observed_upper_near_limit per joint
Determine recommended soft limits with safety margins
Test each step individually before running full sequence
Verify base_zero_ok remains true during arm motion
_claim_boundary: This is a PLAN-ONLY candidate. No hardware was accessed. No serial frames were sent. No servos were moved. All values are transcribed from manual notes and require calibration verification before any hardware execution.
